name: Prospect driving range
about: Prospect Golf is a premier golf facility in Prospect, Connecticut, that has been serving the Waterbury area since 1982. It offers a comprehensive range of services including an outdoor and indoor driving range, an 18-hole miniature golf course, a professional golf school, a pro shop, and an HD Golf simulator for practice and play. The venue is designed for both casual players and serious golfers, providing a comfortable environment with heated indoor bays and full-length outdoor facilities. Its dual offerings of traditional practice spaces and modern simulation technology make it a versatile destination for game improvement, entertainment, and equipment fitting.
why_golfers_like_it: HD Golf simulator with accurate club and ball tracking technology for realistic ball flight simulation
Heated indoor and outdoor driving bays available for year-round practice
Professional golf school offering customized lessons using computer video analysis
Expert club fitting services to optimize equipment performance

food_and_drink.notes: No information on on-site food service

simulator_hardware.notes: Comprehensive accurate data capture system for club and ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs for use on the driving range and simulator. Club rentals are not explicitly mentioned.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided on outside food or drink policies. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes is not specified on the website. Simulator availability is for instruction, fitting, practice, and play, so duration may vary based on usage.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Prospect Golf offers an 18-hole miniature golf course that is described as great family fun and suitable for birthday parties, making it kid-friendly.
